notes: S0 golden set — the writer's 5 real pieces. run_eval.py generates with/without and judges them; prompts live in raw/ and are pulled in via prompt_file. This is the S0 gate; needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

evals.expected_output: Persuasive proposal email to a business partner: ask/point early, so-what chain to retention and a better UX, honest that it costs more up front, closes by asking for feedback. No invented numbers; sounds like the writer, not a template.

Short Slack note to the team: the new version is live in 30 minutes, puts the ball in their court to review, asks for candid feedback on the one-click-update experience, warm and unpolished. No invented specifics.

LinkedIn post that opens on a point and lands a clear call to action (engineers: ask the one question, speak up), uses the 13-years detail as given, keeps the perception-is-reality thread, no fabricated stats.

Empathetic hard message about the return-to-office guideline: names the stakes for the people who count on them without threatening, acknowledges the frustration honestly, points to the change needed, composed not cold. No invented specifics.

Turns the brain-dump into a coherent short piece with a clear point (enterprises adopt AI but don't get faster; price/token limits cap the gains) using only the writer's own figures (20-30%), keeps the LLM-limitation and security-line threads, no invented numbers.
